## Checklist

- [ ] The change follows the Clean Architecture boundaries (`docs/architecture/02-clean-architecture.md`)
- [ ] No business logic was added to routers
- [ ] New behavior is covered by unit tests; IO paths by integration tests
- [ ] Database changes ship with an Alembic migration
- [ ] Domain events are emitted for state changes that belong in Project Memory
- [ ] API changes are reflected in the OpenAPI contract (`make contracts`)
- [ ] Documentation updated where behavior or architecture changed
